blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,784 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
